product_updates.title: Ford rehires ‘gray beard’ engineers after AI falls short
product_updates.content: "Mistakenly we thought that by just introducing artificial intelligence ... that would produce a high-quality product.”

product_updates.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
product_updates.content: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.
